text: Entering this space, I am immediately struck by an atmosphere of curiosity and experimentation. The bright colors and bold letters—R + D, signifying research and development—invite contemplation on progress and innovation. Yet, the glass barriers create a sense of separation, a reminder that knowledge often has boundaries that we can observe but not always cross. Here, I feel a mix of anticipation and introspection, contemplating the human pursuit of understanding and the ever-shifting relationship between ourselves and technology. It is both inspiring and humbling to be within these walls of inquiry.
